## Problem

<!-- What user-visible problem does this change solve? -->

## Change

<!-- Describe the smallest implemented solution. -->

## Verification

<!-- List commands run and objective results. Documentation-only changes do not require the full test suite. -->

## Risk and compatibility

<!-- Note affected contracts, migration needs, or why the change is backward compatible. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] The change stays within the stated scope.
- [ ] New or changed behavior has regression coverage.
- [ ] Verification is proportional to the change.
- [ ] User-facing documentation is updated when needed.
- [ ] Logs, screenshots, and fixtures contain no secrets or personal data.
